name: ai-panel-studio
description: AI Panel Studio — 圆桌讨论演播厅 (MVP monorepo)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd server && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build
scripts.lint: cd server && npm run lint && cd ../client && npm run lint
scripts.test:all: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:ci: npm run lint && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:e2e
scripts.setup: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && npm run install:browsers
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules server/node_modules client/node_modules server/dist client/dist server/coverage client/e2e-report client/test-results
